home.heroSubtitle: Latin dance school with a Cuban soul. Salsa, bachata, son and reggaeton. No partner needed.
home.featuredCoursesSub: Find your rhythm and start dancing from day one.
home.upcomingEventsSub: Parties, workshops and festivals to enjoy dance beyond the studio.
home.socialSub: The latest from our social media.
home.clubTitle: More than a school, a social club
home.clubText: El Malecón is community: we dance, share and celebrate together. Come meet us.

school.title: The School
school.subtitle: History, facilities and the team that gets Castelldefels dancing.
school.historyText: We were born to bring Latin dance to Castelldefels with the energy and flavour of the Caribbean. Our philosophy: learning while having fun, as a community, and with no partner needed.

courses.title: Courses
courses.subtitle: Programs for every level. Images generated for this initial phase.

schedule.title: Schedule & Prices
schedule.subtitle: Check the weekly calendar and book your spot.

events.title: Events
events.subtitle: Upcoming dates, historic gallery and news from our social media.
events.newsSub: Latest posts from Facebook, Instagram, YouTube and TikTok.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Ready to dance? Message us on WhatsApp or leave your details.
contact.name: Name
contact.consent: I have read and accept the privacy policy.

contact.error: Could not send. Try again or message us on WhatsApp.

cookies.text: We use technical cookies and, with your consent, analytics and social media cookies.
